summary: Tested all 18 critical bug fixes in the customer subscription-to-order flow (Stripe, GoCardless, bank transfer, scheduler). 34/34 backend tests passed. All fixes verified via code inspection + live HTTP tests with webhook simulation.

minor.issue: BUG #7, #10, #11 (bank-transfer subscription billing_interval and tenant_id) could NOT be verified via live API because GoCardless is not configured for the edd tenant — the endpoint returns 400 ('Bank transfer payments are currently not available.') before any DB writes happen. Verified via code inspection instead.
minor.priority: LOW — code fix is confirmed present, just untestable in this environment without GC credentials

critical_code_review_comments: BUG #7/#10 environment note: bank-transfer checkout immediately returns 400 when GoCardless is not connected (line 139-141 checkout.py). Code fixes ARE present in the source but cannot be verified via live API without a configured GC connection.
checkout_status endpoint creates order+subscription in one HTTP call — this is fine but means cleanup for orphaned pending orders on Stripe failure should be handled.

Stripe webhook handle_webhook has no webhook_secret set (StripeCheckout initialized without it) — this means ANY raw JSON event can trigger the webhook handler. Consider adding webhook secret in production.

billing_interval in checkout_status subscription fallback reads from product.get('billing_interval') with fallback to 'monthly' — this means newly created subscriptions via checkout_status always get billing_interval even if product doesn't explicitly set one.

test_credentials.customer: rushabh0996+1@gmail.com / Test1234! (edd tenant, password set by tester)

seed_data_creation: Test customer password reset to 'Test1234!' (rushabh0996+1@gmail.com). Test products created/deleted within tests. Test subscriptions created/deleted within tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 18 checkout flow bug fixes verified: 18 code-inspection tests passed, 5 live webhook/DB tests passed, 8 API regression tests passed, 3 scheduler tests passed. Customer login: rushabh0996+1@gmail.com / Test1234! (edd tenant). EDD tenant_id: bd229c3b-13ca-4426-aa3b-5e3096c8954b. Key note: GoCardless not configured for edd tenant so bank-transfer endpoints are blocked at line 139-141 checkout.py — BT bugs verified via code inspection only. Stripe webhook_secret NOT set in StripeCheckout init, so any JSON event triggers the handler (no signature validation). All test data cleaned up.

test_results_detail.BUG1_tenant_id_stripe_order: PASS — code inspection (order_doc has tenant_id) + live DB verification (order created with tenant_id=edd before Stripe call)
test_results_detail.BUG2_customer_id_payment_tx: PASS — code inspection confirms customer_id in payment_transactions insert + IDOR guard present (transaction.customer_id != customer.id check)
test_results_detail.BUG3_subscription_create_fallback: PASS — live Stripe webhook test: sent invoice.paid with billing_reason=subscription_create, confirmed subscription created in DB with tenant_id and billing_interval=monthly
test_results_detail.BUG4_stripe_renewal_date_advance: PASS — live Stripe webhook test: sent invoice.paid with subscription_cycle, confirmed renewal_date advanced from 2026-02-01 → 2026-03-01
test_results_detail.BUG5_gc_renewal_date_advance: PASS — live GC webhook test: sent payment confirmed event, confirmed renewal_date advanced and renewal order created
test_results_detail.BUG6_gc_initial_order: PASS — code inspection: gocardless.py has subscription_start order insert with tenant_id on complete-redirect
test_results_detail.BUG7_billing_interval_bt_sub: PASS (code inspection) — billing_interval set in bank-transfer subscription insert; live test blocked by GC not configured
test_results_detail.BUG8_billing_interval_cs_sub: PASS — code inspection: checkout_status subscription fallback has _cs_billing_interval and billing_interval field
test_results_detail.LOGIC9_stripe_renewal_fx: PASS — code inspection confirms _renewal_base_amount computed via FX; live test confirms base_currency_amount field present in renewal order
test_results_detail.LOGIC10_bt_sub_tenant_id: PASS (code inspection) — subscription insert has tenant_id in BT checkout
test_results_detail.LOGIC11_bt_one_time_tenant_id: PASS (code inspection) — one-time order_doc has tenant_id in BT checkout
test_results_detail.LOGIC12_gc_renewal_fx: PASS — code inspection confirms _gc_base_amount computed via FX; live GC webhook test confirms base_currency_amount in renewal order
test_results_detail.LOGIC13_cs_sub_tenant_id: PASS — code inspection: checkout_status subscription insert has order.get('tenant_id', '')
test_results_detail.LOGIC14_scheduler_tax_fx: PASS — direct scheduler invocation: renewal order created with tax_amount=10.0, base_currency=GBP, base_currency_amount set correctly
test_results_detail.LOGIC15_dispatch_new_renewal_date: PASS — code inspection: both Stripe and GC dispatch use _stripe_new_renewal/_gc_new_renewal as next_billing_date; live tests confirm correct new date dispatched
test_results_detail.API_regression_checkout_session: PASS — requires auth (401), rejects missing terms (400), creates order in DB
test_results_detail.API_regression_bank_transfer: PASS — requires auth (401), rejects missing terms (400)
test_results_detail.API_regression_checkout_status: PASS — invalid session returns 404, requires auth, IDOR guard returns 4xx for cross-customer access
